mapper.update: UPDATE test_results SET patient_id = #{patientId}, patient_name = #{patientName}, test_item = #{testItem}, test_value = #{testValue}, unit = #{unit}, reference_range = #{referenceRange}, test_date = #{testDate}, status = #{status}, ai_review_result = #{aiReviewResult}, ai_review_time = #{aiReviewTime}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM test_results ORDER BY test_date DESC
